name: South Carolina Residential Builders Commission License Lookup
updateFrequency: the official lookup states that it is updated nightly
licenseTypesIncluded: Residential Specialty Heating and Air License (RBH)
knownExclusions: Commercial general and mechanical contractor credentials use the separate Contractor's Licensing Board source.
Residential home inspector credentials are outside OpenTrade's contractor and skilled-trade focus.
Municipal permits, business registrations, and work below statutory thresholds are outside this source entry.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Use the official lookup manually and do not automate it without reviewing current access controls and terms.
publicRecordsNotes: The lookup explains active, approved, pending, inactive, lapsed, suspended, and cease-and-desist statuses and warns users to check the commercial contractor board when a residential search returns no record. No match in this source is not proof that no credential exists.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: The commission offers a paid licensee-list request, but no public machine-readable bulk download has been confirmed.
researchNotes: The commission separately regulates residential builders, residential electrical, HVAC and plumbing contractors, and specialty registrations including roofing and solar. The public lookup is a manual handoff pending a stable, reviewed machine-readable interface.
maintainerNotes: Preserve the commission's explicit status definitions, nightly-update statement, statutory thresholds, and direction to check the commercial board when a residential search returns no record.

researchEvidence.note: Official lookup reviewed for searchable fields, status meanings, nightly update cadence, and cross-board no-match guidance.
Official commission page reviewed for builder, electrical, HVAC, plumbing, and specialty credential types.
Official applications page reviewed for roofing and solar specialty registration classifications.

blocker.summary: The source is an interactive public lookup without a reviewed stable machine-readable contract; normal use remains an official manual handoff.
